title: Better Firefly Bushes
description: Client-side-only firefly bush animation configuration, allowing the player to toggle on/off firefly bush animations during the daytime when fireflies are not active in real life.
body:
In the real world, fireflies are not active or visible during the day. However, the firefly bushes released in Minecraft in 1.21.5 flash all night and all day. This makes them a bit difficult to use in areas that you mostly visit during the day or in large groups (see [this video by BdoubleO100 on the topic](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zxPf9Ah1row&t=882s)).

This Fabric 1.21.10+ mod mitigates this daytime problem with firefly bushes by adding time-based control to their animation. Fireflies flash at night, but not during the day.


# Features
- Configure the time window where firefly bushes animate (default: night)
- Configure the sprite/animation frame that the firefly bush freezes on when not animating



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2mvVagcm1Dc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Dependencies
- [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (optional, but recommended)


## Configuration

- ``enableTimeBasedControl`` (default: true) - Enable/disable time-based animation control
- ``animationStartTime`` (default: 12000) - Minecraft time when animations start (0-24000)
- ``animationEndTime`` (default: 23000) - Minecraft time when animations end (0-24000)
- ``frozenFrame`` (default: 0) - Frame to display when not animating (0-1000)

These field are editable with ModMenu, or by editing ``.minecraft/config/better-firefly-bushes.properties``.

## Known Bugs

- [#8](https://github.com/zdwolfe/minecraft-better-firefly-bushes/issues/8) As of 1.21.11, the ``frozenFrame`` setting is not respected due to a breaking API change.
